title: Graz, Styria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Graz, Styria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Graz is a city in Styria with a population of 302,749. Austria’s second-largest city, a UNESCO City of Design with a beautifully preserved medieval old town, a thriving culinary scene, and a dynamic student population.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
